Vendre seul (DPP / FSBO) demande de gére: Selling on your own (FSBO) means managing the marketing, the photography, the showings, qualifying buyers, drafting offers and notarial coordination. In Quebec, several studies — including those published by the APCIQ — suggest that properties sold with a broker obtain on average a better net price after commission, but results vary by local market and property. What matters most, in my view: having fair price positioning, professional marketing and availability for buyers.
Vendre une maison, c'est rarement juste: Selling a home is rarely just a financial transaction. It's a move, a life change, sometimes a separation, sometimes a loss. Emotion is part of the process, and ignoring it doesn't make it disappear.
